title: microlepia exserta
intro: Microlepia exserta is a species of fern that belongs to the family Polypodiaceae, commonly known as the spleenwort fern. Traditionally, this plant has been used in various herbal remedies due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits associated with Microlepia exserta include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and provide relief from digestive problems. Microlepia exserta is often prepared for medicinal use through various herbal preparations, such as decoctions, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed in the form of teas, capsules, or applied topically as poultices or creams.
